title: Golden Carrots Hunger Bar
description: Resource pack to replace hunger bar with golden carrots.
body:
# Golden Carrots Hunger Bar

![Hunger bar preview](https://github.com/voidpointer0x00/golden-carrot-hunger-bar/blob/master/.github/golden-carrots.png?raw=true)

Resource pack that replaces Minecraft's default hunger bar with golden carrots.
